name: Moscardini De Pesach
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine almonds, sugar, salt, cocoa, matzo meal, orange rind, almond extract, egg, and egg yolk in a small bowl.
3. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls onto an oiled baking sheet dusted with matzo meal.
4. Shape each cookie into an oval and flatten with the back of a fork.
5. Bake for 10 minutes.
6. Cool on a rack.
Makes 2-1/2 dozen 3-inch cookies.
